name: stop: 'STOP' (any case) opts the guest out and writes Opted Out + Opted Out At on the exact event (B14/F24)
comment: Behaviours 1 and 5: STOP is case-insensitive (the inbound is lowercased before matching, so STOP/Stop/stop all match), and Opted Out / Opted Out At are written at the moment of the STOP. One acknowledgement is sent explaining how to opt back in.
